location: Sold by the Nomadic Merchant near the Forest-Spanning Greatbridge Site of Grace in Altus Plateau (the same merchant stall that sells the Red Crest Heater Shield).
tactics: Same merchant location as the Red Crest Heater Shield — check the full shop list so you don't miss one while buying the other.
Higher Strength requirement (12) than most early shields, so weigh it against your build before buying.
lore: A sturdy, well-regarded metal shield marked with a yellow scorpion — a symbol warning of sudden, surprise strikes.

builds.name: Strength tank build
builds.why: 100% physical negation and solid guard boost (57) for a mid-game Strength-scaling turtle build.
